text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Strange... I thought I heard the most<n>passionate
melody coming from the<n>courtyard just now.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Was that you by any chance?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeees! It was my flamenco guitar skills!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
When I play my guitar, my passion, my<n>zeal, my
fervor boils over! I want to let<n>my spirit soar!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, I can't take it anymore! I mustexpress these feelings through DANCE!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Such passion! Such abundance!<n>It's
moving me to my core!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... I can feel my legs being carried<n>away by
the rhythm!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ooohoho! Let us dance like they do in<n>Vegas!
We're going to party all night<n>long!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Flamenco! Those steps! That passion!<n>Dance on,
my dangerous beauty!
